articles.title: Circle To ‘Stand Behind’ USDC, Cover $3.3 Billion Shortfall Held in Silicon Valley Bank
articles.description: Circle stated it would use corporate resources and "external capital if necessary" to ensure that USDC is redeemable for the US Dollar at a 1:1 ratio.

articles.title: This is Europe’s Most Crypto-Curious Country (Study)
articles.description: Dua Crypto determined that the Netherlands, Slovenia, and Switzerland are the most crypto-curious nations in Europe.

articles.title: USDC will remain redeemable 1 for 1 with U.S. dollar, Circle says
articles.description: The USDC issuer said its operations will resume as usual on Monday and that the stablecoin will remain redeemable one-for-one with the U.S. dollar after Silicon Valley Bank collapsed.

articles.title: USDC slowly repegs on unconfirmed reports of SVB resolution
articles.description: According to insiders, 50% of uninsured deposits will be paid out by next week.

articles.title: ATOM bulls watch closely as Cosmos interchain security prepares for March 15 launch
articles.description: Cosmos governance has approved the v9-Lambda upgrade, including interchain security and possibly kicking off a “virtuous real yield cycle.”

articles.title: Hackers Exploit Ethereum (ETH) Rival, Normal Activity Paused To Prevent Theft of More Tokens
articles.description: Layer-1 blockchain Hedera (HBAR) had to pause normal activity this week due to a hack on its smart contract service code. The Ethereum (ETH) competitor acknowledged the exploit in a tweet on Thursday. “Today, attackers exploited the Smart Contract Service code of the Hedera mainnet to transfer Hedera Token Service tokens held by victims’ accounts […]

articles.title: Circle Confirms $3.3B of USDC's Cash Reserves Stuck at Failed Silicon Valley Bank
articles.description: Silicon Valley Bank, one of the reserve banking partner for Circle's USDC stablecoin, was shut down by regulators on Friday.

articles.title: Circle says $3.3 billion of USDC reserves are with Silicon Valley Bank
articles.description: Circle says USDC's exposure to Silicon Valley Bank stands at $3.3 billion.

articles.title: Circle’s USDC Endured $1B of Net Redemptions Since Silicon Valley Bank's Shutdown
articles.description: Stablecoin issuer Circle held an undisclosed amount of USDC’s cash reserves at failed Silicon Valley Bank.

articles.title: USDC Stablecoin Depegs From $1; Circle Says Operations Are Normal
articles.description: USDC dropped to $0.973, its lowest level since the collapse of FTX.
